text: 人生不相见，动如参与商。
translation: Life keeps us apart like stars that never meet.

text: 我不去想是否能够成功，既然选择了远方，便只顾风雨兼程。
translation: I don't worry about success — having chosen the distant path, I simply press on through wind and rain.

text: 世界上只有一种英雄主义，就是在认清生活真相之后依然热爱生活。
translation: There is only one heroism: to see the world as it is, and to love it still.

text: 长亭外，古道边，芳草碧连天。
translation: Beyond the pavilion, along the old road, green grass stretches to the sky.
When you bloom, the gentle breeze will come.
Books are the ladder of human progress.

text: 读一本好书，就是和许多高尚的人谈话。
translation: To read a good book is to converse with many noble minds.

text: 大千世界里的芸芸众生，都是自己故事里的主角。
translation: Every soul in this vast world is the protagonist of their own story.

text: 所谓无底深渊，下去，也是前程万里。
translation: What seems like a bottomless abyss — step in, and you'll find the sky opens wide.

text: 从此，你在我的生命里，在我的文字里，在我向往的一切里。
translation: From now on, you are in my life, in my words, in everything I long for.
